title: Generating ASCII Diagrams for Complex Data Structures
scenario: Design a JSON artifact representing a nested directory structure. The output should be a valid ASCII diagram illustrating the hierarchy, including all nodes and their relationships. The diagram should be readable and easily understandable.
constraints: Must be readable and understandable without additional context
Must illustrate the entire hierarchy of nodes and their relationships
Must adhere to standard ASCII art conventions

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluates if the generated diagram is readable and easily understandable.
Verifies if the diagram accurately represents the hierarchy of nodes and their relationships.
Checks if the generated diagram adheres to standard ASCII art conventions.
